title: [CI:DOCS] Add quick start directions to APIv2 Dock
body:
Adds some quick start up directions to the top of the
API v2 documentation and a few examples.
This strongly leverages comments from @jgallucci32 in #6535.

Fixes: #6535

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *TomSweeneyRedHat* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [TomSweeneyRedHat] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Can this be merged now?  I'm happy to circle back to handle the outcome of the discussions with @agebhar1 , but in the short term would like to see how this looks once published.   I fear once pushed I may need to touch up formatting issues.
